title: Filing of Complaints by Victims of Illegal Recruitment
content:
Victims of illegal recruitment may file their reports or complaints with any of the following offices:

1. Anti-Illegal Recruitment Branch, POEA, 4th Floor POEA Building, Edsa corner Ortigas, Mandaluyong City.
2. POEA Regional Centers and Regional Extension Units.
3. DOLE Regional Offices.
4. National Bureau of Investigation, Philippine National Police, and related law enforcement authorities.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
